counters.description: the vision wars of that scale call for a control ward.

synergies.description: clones kind of look like you.
seeing a clone dying and trying to save it is a graceful act, and should be honored regardless.
with or against, whenever a box ends up on him after a hook, it's a good situation. an interesting match-up either way.
you are going to love her ball.
